word: H2819 - חַשְׁחוּת - chashchûwth - khash-khooth' - Be needful

sections.paragraph:
Original: חשׁחוּת

Transliteration: chashchûth

Phonetic: khash-khooth'

BDB Definition:

  1. things needed, requirements, that which is required

Origin: from a root corresponding to H2818

TWOT entry: 2746b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
